item.title: Getting a Job in Information Technology
item.category: "IT job search" , "IT resume" , "IT interview questions" , "entry level IT jobs" , "remote IT jobs" , "IT internships" , "IT salary" , "IT job market"
item.description: How to find, apply for, and land IT jobs — from resume writing and interview prep to entry-level strategies, internships, and remote work.
